mapper.select:
SELECT HE.EMPID AS empId, HE.PERSON_ID AS personId, HE.LOCAL_NAME AS localName, HE.POST_FAMILY AS postFamily, HE.POST_GRADE_NO AS postGradeNo, HE.POSITION_NO AS positionNo, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS deptName, GET_DEPT_MANAGER_INFO(HE.DEPTNO) headDepartment, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.DUTY_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS dutyName, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS postFamilyName, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS postGradeName, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POSITION_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS positionNoName, TO_CHAR(HE.DATE_STARTED, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS dateStarted,
TO_CHAR(HP.DOB, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS dob, HP.SEXCODE AS sexCode, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HP.SEXCODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS sexName, HP.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE AS maritalStatusCode, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HP.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS maritalStatusName, HP.NATION_CODE AS nationCode, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HP.NATION_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS nationName, HP.NATIONALITY_CODE AS nationalityCode, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HP.NATIONALITY_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS nationalityName,
HP.HOUSE_TP AS houseTp, HP.HOME_PHONE AS homePhone, HP.COMPANY_PHONE AS companyPhone, HP.CELLPHONE AS cellphone, HP.RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION AS residentialDistinction, HP.EXIST_SINGLE AS existSingle, HP.EMAIL AS email, HP.EMAIL_SECOND AS emailSecond, HP.SING_ID AS singId, HP.HOME_ADDRESS AS homeAddress, HP.OFFICE_PHONE AS officePhone, HP.IDCARD_NO AS idcardNo FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HE LEFT JOIN HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP ON HE.PERSON_ID = HP.PERSON_ID AND HP.ACTIVITY = 1 LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON HE.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE HE.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HE.ACTIVITY = 1
